s1_ready.provisional_note: RATIFIED (2026-07-10, verifier re-render + visual inspection per PRD sec14 rule). Originally MINTED in P3 (task 077) — the F2 fixture's post-settle READY frame, glanced after pane.wait_settled returns settled=true. P3 changes NO rendering code (settle is a pure watch-channel wait + the shux-vt monotonic clock exposed public); this golden is produced by the SAME P2-approved raster + harness fixture-font chain on the FROZEN F2 fixture. Determinism proven: byte-identical across 3 standalone runs AND the S2 100x flake gate (100/100 byte-identical). Visually inspected by the implementing agent (LENS-F2-SPIN sentinel, amber braille spinner at grid (1,1), green-bold READY at grid (11,34), truecolor + 256-color + basic-color legend rows — no monochrome regression). Independently re-verified by the downstream verifier: re-render under an isolated XDG env with a freshly built release binary was byte-identical (cmp clean, sha256 matches) and visually inspected at full resolution with the same findings. See BASELINE-APPROVAL.md P3 addendum for the full ratification record.

d2_heat.provisional_note: RATIFIED (2026-07-10, independent P4 verifier re-render + visual inspection; SOLID VT QA heat-scope PASS at .shux/qa/lens-p4/SOLID-QA.md is the full-gate prerequisite this golden required). Verifier re-render: direct RPC (pane.glance{checkpoint:true} -> `a` -> pane.wait_settled -> pane.diff_since{heat_png:true}) under a FRESH isolated XDG daemon with the harness fixture-font chain — byte-identical to the committed golden (cmp clean; sha256 deef295d… matches); delta independently re-derived (cells_changed=10, regions [{2,2,3},{5,10,19}]). Full-res visual inspection: heat tint on exactly the 10 changed cells (red block at (2,2) + A-PRESSED at (5,10)..(5,18)); title/marker/colour legend visibly desaturated but still coloured; no tofu. Heat determinism additionally proven live: two CLI --heat renders byte-identical AND RPC base64 == CLI file bytes. Original mint record: MINTED in P4 (task 077) from the ACTUAL pane.diff_since heat-PNG render — the F4 fixture after `a`, diffed against the pre-`a` checkpoint. This is the ONE golden in P4 that exercises NEW rendering (the LENS-R-037 heat overlay: changed cells alpha-blended with rgba(163,38,56,128), unchanged cells desaturated 50% via Rec.601 luma). The base frame is the P2-approved glance raster + harness fixture-font chain on the FROZEN F4 fixture (unchanged rendering); only the post-render overlay is new, and its colours/desaturation are PRD-mandated. Determinism: integer-only overlay math; heat_png_is_deterministic unit test proves same-input byte-identity.
